overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dense forest at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The camera moves steadily along a narrow dirt trail surrounded by trees and undergrowth, approaching and passing a yellow tennis ball lying in the center of the path. The footage features atmospheric lighting and realistic vegetation typical of a game engine.

The camera moves along a narrow dirt trail surrounded by thick undergrowth and tall trees. Near the end of the segment, a yellow tennis ball becomes visible in the distance, lying in the center of the path.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the forest trail, rapidly approaching the yellow tennis ball that lies in the center of the path. The ball grows larger in the frame as the camera gets closer, eventually passing it and leaving it behind. The surrounding dense forest and narrow dirt path remain consistent throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dark, dense forest that culminates in the discovery and passing of a solitary object on the path. It begins with a steady walk along a narrow dirt trail, where a flashlight cuts through the night to reveal thick undergrowth and towering trees. As the camera advances, a small yellow tennis ball emerges from the darkness in the distance, lying directly in the center of the path. The scene then shifts as the camera rapidly approaches the object, causing the ball to grow larger in the frame before the viewer eventually passes it. The movement finally leaves the ball behind, continuing forward into the consistent gloom of the surrounding woods.
